assets.caption: Raw diff remains available as the review fallback
Agent briefing shown by default with flagged and boilerplate files

scenario.title: Agent briefing as default PR review view
steps: Click a PR awaiting review item
Verify briefing view is the default (not raw diff)
Verify briefing summary text is visible
Verify flagged files with risk chips and inline hunks
Verify tab toggle shows Briefing and Raw diff
Verify clicking Raw diff tab switches to diff view
Verify clicking Briefing tab returns to briefing view
Verify boilerplate section is collapsed by default
Press Escape and verify review mode closes

assertions.description: Review mode is accessible (via inbox or direct entry)
The briefing view is the default view in review mode (not raw diff)
The briefing summary is visible with analysis text
Flagged files are visible with risk chips and inline diff hunks
The tab toggle shows both Briefing and Raw diff options
Clicking the Raw diff tab switches to the raw diff view
Clicking the Briefing tab returns to the briefing view
Boilerplate section is present and collapsed by default
Pressing Escape closes review mode and returns to inbox

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Agent briefing as default PR review view

![Raw diff remains available as the review fallback](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/archive/2026-07-20-gh-154-agent-briefing-default/evidence/01-raw-diff.webp)
![Agent briefing shown by default with flagged and boilerplate files](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/archive/2026-07-20-gh-154-agent-briefing-default/evidence/02-briefing.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Navigate to the inbox view
2. Click a PR awaiting review item
3. Verify briefing view is the default (not raw diff)
4. Verify briefing summary text is visible
5. Verify flagged files with risk chips and inline hunks
6. Verify tab toggle shows Briefing and Raw diff
7. Verify clicking Raw diff tab switches to diff view
8. Verify clicking Briefing tab returns to briefing view
9. Verify boilerplate section is collapsed by default
10. Press Escape and verify review mode closes

</details>
